functions.name: provisioner_single_board_plugin.src.raspberry_pi.node.cli.configure
documentation:
Select a remote Raspberry Pi node to configure Raspbian OS software and hardware settings.
Configuration is aimed for an optimal headless Raspberry Pi used as a Kubernetes cluster node.

variables.name: provisioner_single_board_plugin.src.config.domain.config.SINGLE_BOARD_PLUGIN_NAME
documentation:
Configuration structure -

os:
    raspbian:
    download_path: $HOME/temp/rpi_raspios_image
    active_system: 64bit
    download_url:
        64bit: https://downloads.raspberrypi.org/raspios_lite_arm64/images/raspios_lite_arm64-2022-01-28/2022-01-28-raspios-bullseye-arm64-lite.zip
        32bit: https://downloads.raspberrypi.org/raspios_lite_armhf/images/raspios_lite_armhf-2022-01-28/2022-01-28-raspios-bullseye-armhf-lite.zi

network:
    gw_ip_address: 192.168.1.1
    dns_ip_address: 192.168.1.1

remote: {}
vcs: {}
